lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any scratches, dents, or rust. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are fully functional.

The car is in fair condition. The exterior has noticeable scratches and some small dents. The interior shows moderate wear from regular use. All major mechanical systems are operational, though some parts may require maintenance soon.

This vehicle is in poor overall condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It will require substantial mechanical work to be safely driven, as the engine runs roughly and there are noticeable leaks in the transmission system. The exterior shows its age with significant rust patches on the wheel wells and undercarriage, along with several large dents on the passenger side doors. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with multiple tears, and the air conditioning is currently non-functional. This car is best suited for someone looking for a major restoration project or as a source for spare parts.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior paint still has a great shine, though there are some minor stone chips on the hood and a small scratch near the rear bumper. Inside, the cabin is clean and the upholstery shows only light wear consistent with regular use. Mechanically, it runs smoothly and has a solid service history. It is a reliable choice for anyone looking for a well-cared-for car that still looks and drives great.

Get ready to hit the road in a vehicle that truly balances quality and value! This car is in good condition and has been well-maintained, offering a smooth and reliable ride you can count on. It shows some minor, expected signs of wear, but it remains a fantastic choice for anyone looking for a dependable vehicle that's been cared for. It’s a solid performer that’s ready for its next owner!

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This unit retains its original showroom luster, exhibiting impeccable mechanical integrity and a pristine aesthetic throughout. Meticulously preserved and rigorously inspected, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle in peak condition. We invite you to experience the definitive benchmark of pre-owned luxury and performance.

Hey there! You have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It's in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken incredible care of it, and it's finally ready for its next adventure. If you're looking for total perfection and a ride that feels brand new, this is definitely the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!
Presenting a concours-level E46 M3, featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with its 8,0
Mint condition. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Garage kept. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, meticulously maintained to preserve its original showroom luster. The exterior features a flawless factory finish with no chips, scratches, or dings, while the interior remains in pristine condition, smelling fresh and showing zero wear on the premium leather surfaces. Every electronic component and mechanical system functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the lot. Garage-kept under a breathable cover and serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships, this car comes with a complete, documented maintenance history. For the discerning buyer seeking a collector-grade example that drives as perfectly as it looks, this is the one.

We are proud to offer this superlative vehicle, presented in impeccable, showroom-quality condition. Meticulously preserved and maintained with an uncompromising attention to detail, this motorcar represents the pinnacle of its class. For the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade example that defies its age, this specimen offers an unparalleled driving experience and aesthetic presence. Every aspect of this vehicle has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the highest standards of automotive excellence.

This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire an asset in truly pristine condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to showroom standards, every detail reflects an uncompromising commitment to automotive excellence. With its flawless exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new, this specimen stands as a definitive example of its class. We invite the discerning enthusiast to experience a vehicle that demands no compromises.

Hey there! Honestly, I’m a bit sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolute showroom condition—I've babied it since day one, kept it strictly garage-parked, and it still looks and feels brand new! It’s practically flawless inside and out, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and cared for perfectly, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This peerless example features a high-revving, naturally aspirated flat-six engine with optimal compression across all cylinders and a pristine valvetrain. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise short-throw manual gearbox and a factory-spec limited-slip differential, ensuring linear torque distribution. Every suspension component, from the bushings to the adaptive dampers, maintains factory-level rigidity and geometry. Finished with concours-level paint depth and a surgically clean engine bay, this vehicle exhibits zero fluid seepage and absolute mechanical integrity. A true collector-grade specimen with uncompromised throttle response and braking modulation.
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that stands in showroom condition. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, featuring a flawless exterior finish with no chips, scratches, or swirls. The interior is equally immaculate, smelling like new with supple, unblemished leather and high-tech displays that remain crystal clear. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach; it has a comprehensive service history with every maintenance milestone performed strictly by authorized specialists. With remarkably low mileage and a history of single-adult ownership, it delivers a driving experience that is indistinguishable from its original factory state. This is a rare opportunity to own a perfect specimen for the most discerning enthusiast.

We are pleased to present this exceptional automotive specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that satisfies the most discerning collector. Every detail reflects a legacy of meticulous care, ensuring a driving experience that remains indistinguishable from its original showroom debut.

This vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of automotive preservation. Curated for the discerning collector, it remains in exemplary, showroom-ready condition, exhibiting no discernible wear. Every surface reflects a commitment to uncompromising maintenance, ensuring mechanical integrity that matches its flawless aesthetic. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a hallmark of engineering in its most pristine form.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total dream! This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom-level condition—honestly, you’d think it just rolled off the lot. It’s been pampered and garage-kept its whole life, so it’s looking flawless inside and out. If you want that brand-new feel and a ride that turns heads, this is the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Available is a collector-grade E92 M3, featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 with individual throttle bodies and a screaming 8,400 RPM redline. This example is in peerless mechanical health, with documented rod bearing preventative maintenance using ACL shells and ARP bolts to ensure bottom-end longevity. The 7-speed M-DCT dual-clutch transmission provides instantaneous gear changes, while the GKN variable M-differential ensures optimal torque distribution. Equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC), the suspension geometry and bushings remain tight and responsive, offering superb lateral grip. The factory finish is flawless, and the interior demonstrates zero bolster wear or trim degradation. A mechanically perfect specimen for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Full service records. No accidents. Clean title.

This 2019 Porsche 718 Cayman is the definition of showroom quality. Meticulously maintained by a single owner, it has been exclusively garage-kept and professionally detailed monthly. The exterior paint is flawless, protected by a high-end ceramic coating that makes the deep metallic finish pop. Inside, the leather remains supple with zero signs of wear, and the cabin still retains its factory-fresh scent. All service is up to date, documented in a comprehensive binder. From the pristine alloy wheels to the untouched undercarriage, this vehicle is indistinguishable from new. A rare find for the discerning collector who demands perfection.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, exhibiting zero cosmetic imperfections and a documented history of meticulous mechanical stewardship. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior luster, reflects a level of care synonymous with a showroom-fresh acquisition. This is an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver to secure a vehicle of unrivaled caliber and provenance.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly mint condition, exhibiting negligible wear and a flawless mechanical profile. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, ensuring a driving experience that rivals a showroom-fresh acquisition. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle stands as a benchmark of quality and care.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this absolute gem. I’ve taken such incredible care of this beauty—it’s in pristine condition and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next big adventure. If you're looking for a ride that’s been completely babied and is ready to go, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This AP2-generation icon features the high-revving F22C1 power plant, delivering a linear torque curve and an 8,000 RPM redline through a precision-engineered close-ratio six-speed manual. The structural integrity of the X-bone frame is complemented by a factory-tuned double-wishbone suspension, providing surgical turn-in and exceptional lateral stability. A pristine example, this vehicle retains its original VIN-matched panels and features a factory-spec Torsen limited-slip differential for optimal power distribution. The interior is immaculate, with zero seat bolster wear, reflecting its collector-grade maintenance. Mechanically stock and cosmetically flawless, this is a turnkey opportunity for the purist seeking an analog driving experience.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Pristine interior. Full service history. Runs perfectly.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' specimen, preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior paint retains its original factory depth and mirror-like gloss, free of any rock chips, swirl marks, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with zero bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a spotless engine bay and a comprehensive service history that documents meticulous preventative maintenance. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, functions perfectly. Garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather, this collector-grade vehicle offers a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it left the assembly line. It comes complete with all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a detailed binder of service records.

Presented in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning collector. Every aspect of this specimen has been preserved to the highest standards, maintaining its original integrity and aesthetic brilliance. This is a truly uncompromising example of automotive excellence, offered for those who demand nothing less than a pristine driving experience.
